programme.title: Grace
programme.desc: The aftermath of ACC Cassian Pewe’s betrayal hangs heavily over East Sussex Police several months on as Grace’s team is in the midst of an anti-corruption enquiry while Roy wrestles with whether to trust Cassian’s intel about Sandy’s murder and the threat to Bruno’s life - his team is plunged into a case filled with secrets after Eden, the wife of Brighton property developer Neel, is reported missing by her distraught husband. A terrifying voicemail left on her best friend’s phone suggests Eden may have been taken against her will and signs at the couple’s house point to a disturbance - when Neel reveals he’s recently been threatened by a local crook in connection with his housing development, Roy believes this to be the cause but an emerging trail of evidence soon points to something more sinister. Roy delves into Neel and Eden’s life to understand what happened that night - and must unravel what is real and what is false in a tangled case where everyone has something to hide.

programme.title: DCI Banks
programme.desc: Crime drama series. Banks and his team are called on to investigate the murder of teenager Ellie Clayton, the daughter of an internet entrepreneur - the high profile of the victim's family, coupled with the suggestion that she had also been raped, means that there is intense media speculation about the case. There is strong evidence implicating Owen Pierce, a local theatre director who ran the workshop that Ellie attended on the night she died - Pierce is charged with the murder, but DI Helen Morton has her doubts about his guilt and Banks soon finds the actions of his entire team and his friendship with Morton on trial.

programme.title: DCI Banks
programme.desc: Crime drama series. The collapse of Owen Pierce's trial has left the case wide open and a killer still on the loose - as Banks sets out to collect watertight evidence against Pierce, who is still his prime suspect, Morton tries to persuade him to keep an open mind. Promising new information leading to Tyler Judd then comes to light and it looks as if the team might finally be closer to the truth behind Ellie Clayton's murder, but when another schoolgirl is murdered, Pierce comes under the spotlight again. Can Banks and Morton bring the real culprit to justice without ruining their friendship?

programme.title: Lewis
programme.desc: Feature-length drama following on from the Inspector Morse series. When a middle-aged Oxford graduate is found murdered, Lewis and Hathaway launch an investigation which implicates one of the university's most prominent figures - they discover both he and the victim were former members of a hedonistic undergraduate group. When the would-be vice-chancellor is also found dead, Lewis and Hathaway find themselves trawling through ancient Greek clues to find the murderer before he strikes again.

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: Teenager Danny Merrick thinks that he has seen a ghost at Winyard, a creepy house in the woods near Midsomer Newton, as his mother Anne tells house-hunters Caroline and Peter Cave that it could be just the remote cottage they are looking for - however, estate agent Harriet Davis won't let them view the house and claims it's under offer. Undeterred, the Caves visit Winyard... but are spooked and flee only to be garrotted with piano wire. Can Barnaby and acting DC Ben Jones catch their killer?

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale
programme.desc: Nicola tries to convince Rodney to write more stories, while David is furious to discover his girlfriend has received an advance from the publisher. Viv decides to leave.

programme.desc: Donna thinks she has spotted Freddie on CCTV footage and arranges a stakeout with Ross to catch him. Nicola is delighted to learn Rodney has finished another story.

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: Tony fails to impress Carla as he steps into Liam's shoes at the factory. Michelle decides to tackle Lloyd about Steve's fidelity, while David's new employer contacts Audrey.

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: Michelle puts pressure on Lloyd to tell her what he and Steve got up to on their night out. Lloyd lies saying Steve ran up a huge debt in a casino. Audrey’s furious with Ted and David for forging a reference in her name. She threatens to phone David’s new employer but they talk her out of it. Tony tells Carla he’s got a masterplan for the factory. He wants to buy the Kabin and the garage and expand their loading bay out the front.

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: Police drama series set in the Yorkshire Dales. A woman seeks justice when her husband suffers a fatal heart attack after confronting a burglar. Meanwhile, Greengrass prepares for the big gooseberry competition at the village fair.

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: Greengrass is trapped by a runaway digger and realises with horror that he has unearthed an unexploded wartime bomb. Nick is interviewing Station Master Hutton about a spate of railway thefts when he is called away to summon the Bomb Squad and to organise the evacuation of the local schoolchildren. But when Colin, a young train enthusiast, goes missing a huge search is mounted. Hutton befriends Colin, and ends up facing a murder charge when a body turns up in a peculiar place. As the experts continue their dangerous work, the bomb begins to tick and there is still no sign of Colin. Furthermore, when the bomb finally goes off and Bellamy surveys the wreckage, there is no sign of Nick.

programme.title: Vera
programme.desc: Crime drama series based on characters created by Ann Cleeves. Joel Kingston is a copper's copper from a respected and notable police family - his father is the legendary Phil Kingston, a former police sergeant. However, when Joel is found dead floating in a park lake, DCI Vera Stanhope finds herself investigating both sides of the thin blue line in order to find his killer. A complex family dynamic, tensions at work, and brushes with the underworld all paint a dark and complex picture - Joel was there to protect and serve, but did his stubborn commitment to justice at any price lead to his death, or was he killed to stop him revealing a secret that would destroy someone's life? Joel was also a tenacious and ambitious young police officer... but was all that youthful energy and vigour aimed in the right direction? Vera steps on toes and ruffles a few police feathers as she searches for answers as to why PC Joel Kingston is no longer on the beat.

programme.title: DCI Banks
programme.desc: Gritty detective series based on the novels by Peter Robinson. A man and a woman claiming to be social workers come to Katy Heath's house and tell her that they need to take her son Kyle away - Katy complies, but when the boy fails to reappear and the couple prove to be unknown to social services, DCI Alan Banks is drawn into a full-scale search for the child. After a search of Katy's house reveals a drugs connection and several witnesses - including Kyle's father - contradict her version of events, Banks begins to question whether she is telling the truth. DI Helen Morton is asked by Banks to try and win Katy's confidence, but dealing with her own problems appears to be too much for the detective. Meanwhile, DS Annie Cabbot believes she has found a possible suspect at Kyle's school - as the search becomes ever more desperate, Banks must find a way to reconcile his colleagues' conflicting attitudes before it is too late.

programme.title: DCI Banks
programme.desc: Gritty detective series based on novels by Peter Robinson. When the body on the moors is identified as 11-year-old Andre Petri, the team have a murder enquiry on their hands - meanwhile, Kyle Heath is still missing and Banks wonders if there is a connection between Andre's death and Kyle's disappearance. When a post-mortem shows that Andre died from a massive heroin overdose, it looks like the two boys were linked to illegal drugs - as Banks and Annie set out to uncover the criminal underworld on the Elthorpe Estate, Helen begins to suspect that Kyle's abduction may have been engineered by his own mother in order to extort money from Paul Cain. Helen then receives some shocking news about her own son - and her lack of objectivity threatens to derail the case.

programme.title: Lewis
programme.desc: When an old friend of Hathaway's takes their own life, Lewis investigates a link between him and a religious group known as The Garden that he suspects are brainwashing their congregation - however, a serial killer also knows about the organisation and has started to pick off its members one by one, leaving Lewis with only so much time to solve the case before another victim is murdered.

Meanwhile, Sawyer suffers from excruciating headaches and seeks the help of Sun to alleviate them.

programme.title: Sharpe
programme.desc: Napoleonic War-based action-adventure. France 1813 - the war is entering its final stages and the French formulate a desperate plan to capture Wellington's spymaster Major General Ross. Sharpe is ordered by Wellington to accompany Colonel Brand, who is intent on destroying the French main powder supply in the caves of Rocha - Wellington and Ross are both suspicious of Brand's loyalty, but they do not reveal this to Sharpe. The suspicions are well-founded as Brand secretly meets the French and makes plans for capturing Ross - meanwhile, Sharpe's wife on the home front is showing signs of being bored with Army life and enjoys the attentions of a young poet.

programme.title: Millionaire Hot Seat
programme.desc: Jeremy Clarkson hosts the exciting and fast-paced quiz where each episode sees six hopefuls compete for a one-million-pound prize - however, only one player can take their place in the Hot Seat at a time and answer multiple-choice questions to work their way up the Money Ladder. Unlike classic Millionaire, each question is against the clock and there is no room for indecision - if a player answers correctly, they remain in the Hot Seat and continue up the Money Ladder, but if they get a question wrong, they are eliminated, the Top Prize drops down, and the next player takes their place. Each player is given one Pass - a chance to pass the question on to the next player - but in doing so forfeit their place in the Hot Seat and risk not making it back there later on. Only one player will have a chance to win the top prize remaining on the ladder, and the player taking on that question must answer it correctly to take home the cash.

programme.desc: Action from Round 14 of fixtures in the Gallagher Prem, featuring Newcastle v Bristol, Harlequins v Sale, Saracens v Leicester, Northampton v Bath and Gloucester v Exeter. [S]

programme.title: Junk & Disorderly
programme.desc: Henry Cole and his partners Allen Millyard and Guy Willison are back on the road to trawl Britain's sheds and auction houses for rusty relics to restore and sell on for a tidy profit - this time they head for Mark's shed in Shrewsbury to pick up a pile of trinkets before travelling to an auction in Tewkesbury hoping for something bigger to take to their second Kempton autojumble.

programme.title: The Living Daylights
programme.desc: Timothy Dalton picks up the Bond baton. 007 springs into action when the defection of a Soviet general to the West goes alarmingly awry.

programme.title: FYI Daily
programme.desc: Latest news from the world of entertainment.

programme.title: The Living Daylights
programme.desc: Timothy Dalton picks up the Bond baton. 007 springs into action when the defection of a Soviet general to the West goes alarmingly awry.

programme.title: The Grand Fishing Adventure
programme.desc: Ali Hamidi is joined by angling buddy Roo Abbott and diver Luc Boerrigter at Millhayes Lakes in Devon. The mission is to catch a 30lb UK carp, with the bite filmed on an underwater camera. Small lakes in springtime can be notoriously tricky, so with the addition of a diver and underwater cameras, this will be no easy task. After catching some smaller specimens, they crack the tactics and bait code, but will they bank that illusive 30lber before the end of the trip?

programme.title: The Sweeney
programme.desc: Classic '70s police series. Regan and Carter are called to a siege at a bank where two armed robbers are holding hostages.

programme.title: Minder
programme.desc: Comedy-drama series. When Terry goes missing, Arthur Daley returns with a new minder - his nephew Ray - and ambitions to move into Europe... however, Ray seems more susceptible to a con than Arthur's customers, but when Arthur is aghast when he accepts a bouncing cheque, Ray soon proves himself brighter than his uncle had suspected.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Shopping from home.

programme.title: Motorsport Mundial
programme.desc: This programme brings you up to date with the latest action from the world of motorsport and features race coverage, insights, and behind-the-scenes footage from the planet's biggest and best motorsport series. These include the World Rally Championship (WRC), Formula One, World Motocross, NASCAR, British Touring Cars and much more.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Shopping from home.

programme.title: Magnum P.I.
programme.desc: Classic US action drama series. Thomas is visited by his aunt Phoebe - a Pulitzer Prize-winning playwright who claims that she is being stalked by a killer - but the revelation that she has incipient Alzheimer's disease casts doubt on her story.

programme.title: Kojak
programme.desc: The first part of a two-part episode of the classic US detective drama. A murder seems to be the work of a killer that Theo shot years ago - as he questions if he killed the wrong man, Kojak also recalls a lost romance from the same period.

programme.title: The Saint
programme.desc: Escape Route: Simon Templar embarks on another adventure. The Saint is sent to jail to smash a large-scale prison escape organisation run by callous killers. [SL,S] S5 Ep14

programme.title: Boon
programme.desc: Harry falls hopelessly in love with a woman he meets at a fair, but his boasting quickly lands him in hot water.

programme.title: The Sweeney
programme.desc: Classic police drama series. A Turkish police officer gets Regan involved in a top-secret government deal.

programme.title: Battlebots
programme.desc: US robot combat series. Eight bots are left in the sixth series' World Championship quarter-finals - just four fights to the death will decide who moves on to the semi-finals and two steps away from championship glory and the Giant Nut.

programme.title: Magnum P.I.
programme.desc: Classic US action drama series. When Rick is arrested for allegedly killing a hitman hired to murder his mentor Icepick, Thomas finds himself in the midst of a tangled investigation, especially when Rick doesn't deny any of the charges and gives a full confession. However, it is not long before Thomas is on the trail of the real culprit with the help of a resourceful accountant.

programme.title: Kojak
programme.desc: The concluding part of a two-part episode of the classic US detective drama. Finding himself suspended, Theo tries to retrace his movements while tackling a murder case from eight years ago to discover whether he shot the wrong man or not.

programme.title: The Saint
programme.desc: Edward Woodward guest stars in the drama series following the adventures of suave troubleshooter Simon Templar. The Saint saves the life of a British colony's prime minister.

programme.title: Boon
programme.desc: The first episode of the classic drama starring Michael Elphick. Harry Crawford retires from the fire brigade and Ken Boon is forced to resign when his lungs are damaged while rescuing a boy from a blaze - Harry buys seedy hotel The Grand while Ken buys a caravan called The Ponderosa and tries to make a living as a market gardener. When Harry suggests that Ken should supplement his income by offering to do odd jobs for people, he places an advert in the local paper - his first client is Barney Spitz, a pop music promoter who wants Ken to dress up in an old fireman's uniform and star in a pop video.

programme.title: The Sweeney
programme.desc: Classic '70s police drama series. Regan is assigned to ensure the safe shipment of a gold bullion consignment threatened by the plans of a brilliant computer expert bent on revenge.

programme.title: Minder
programme.desc: Comedy-drama series. Arthur ventures into the wine trade with a vintage supplied by the Brothers of the Blessed Bidolph, a small monastic order nestling just off of the A2.

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: US documentary series following salvage experts Mike Wolff and Frank Fritz as they travel around America and the rest of the globe trawling junkyards, garages, attics and barns for precious objects. Mike and Frank explore an 1879 opera house that has been left untouched since the 1930s, Danielle receives some information on a rare gas pump, and Frank meets a 94-year-old collector

programme.title: Ice Road Truckers
programme.desc: Jack Jesse must survive the arctic wilderness and cross a frozen river alone to reach the isolated town of Bettles. Elsewhere, Lisa Kelly is back in action, but the slippery slopes of the Dalton will make her road to redemption a dangerous one.

programme.title: Rocky Balboa
programme.desc: Boxing sequel. When he loses a highly-publicised virtual boxing match to ex-champ Rocky Balboa, reigning heavyweight titleholder Mason Dixon retaliates by challenging the Italian to a nationally-televised 10-round exhibition bout. To the surprise of his son and friends, Rocky agrees to come out of retirement and face an opponent who is faster, stronger, and 30 years younger than him - with the odds stacked firmly against Rocky, he takes on Dixon in what will become the greatest fight in boxing history and a hard-hitting, action-packed battle of the ages.

programme.title: FYI Daily
programme.desc: Latest news from the world of entertainment.

programme.title: Rocky Balboa
programme.desc: Boxing sequel. When he loses a highly-publicised virtual boxing match to ex-champ Rocky Balboa, reigning heavyweight titleholder Mason Dixon retaliates by challenging the Italian to a nationally-televised 10-round exhibition bout. To the surprise of his son and friends, Rocky agrees to come out of retirement and face an opponent who is faster, stronger, and 30 years younger than him - with the odds stacked firmly against Rocky, he takes on Dixon in what will become the greatest fight in boxing history and a hard-hitting, action-packed battle of the ages.

programme.title: Ligue 1 Highlights
programme.desc: Action from the top flight of French football, featuring Brest v Lens, Lyon v Auxerre, Angers v PSG, Toulouse v Monaco, Rennes v Nantes and Marseille v Nice. [S]

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen
programme.desc: The American version of Gordon Ramsay's culinary boot camp. The chefs are given a crash course in business as they learn that it takes both heart and money to run a restaurant - after revered chef and restaurateur Suzanne Goin rates the chefs' dishes, it is time for a dinner service where guests include The Cleaning Lady actress Elodie Yung and influencer Liza Koshy and where multiple close calls leave a few chefs barely scraping by.

programme.title: The Sweeney
programme.desc: Classic '70s police drama series. Regan and his team search for a family held hostage while the father of the clan is forced to help a multi-million-dollar fraud.

programme.title: From
programme.desc: A gruesome discovery sends shockwaves through the town as Jade and Tabitha struggle with the weight of their revelation.

programme.title: Robin Hood
programme.desc: The death of Huntingdon's son deepens the rift between Normans and Saxons; Rob gains a powerful ally in Little John, but the Sheriff's pursuit grows, driving the outlaws deeper into Sherwood; Marian enters the perilous court in Westminster.

programme.title: Robin Hood
programme.desc: Rob leads a daring heist to steal the Sheriff's own bounty for his capture; success could fund their cause, but the risks force every outlaw to face the true cost of rebellion.

programme.title: What Lies Beneath
programme.desc: It had been a year since Dr. Norman Spencer betrayed his beautiful wife Claire. But with Claire oblivious to the truth, Norman's life and marriage seem so perfect that when Claire tells him of hearing mysterious voices and seeing a young woman's image in their home, he dismisses her terror as delusion. Claire moves closer to the truth, and it becomes clear that this apparition will not be dismissed, and has come back for Dr. Spencer and his beautiful wife.

programme.title: The Haunting
programme.desc: This horror tale focuses on visitors to the secluded mansion of Hill House who have been called to the isolated location by Dr. David Marrow (Liam Neeson) as part of a study on insomnia. However, Marrow is really investigating fear, and he plans to scare the subjects, including the introverted Nell (Lili Taylor) and the seductive Theo (Catherine Zeta-Jones). Unfortunately for Marrow and everyone staying at Hill House, the manor is actually haunted by an evil spirit out to torment its guests.

programme.title: Unhuman
programme.desc: Seven misfit students must band together against a growing gang of unhuman savages. Their trust in each other gets tested to the limit in a brutal, horrifying fight to survive as they take down the murderous zombie creatures.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: When a dangerous crime wave hits the beach, the legendary Mitch Buchannon leads his elite squad of lifeguards on a mission to prove that you don't have to wear a badge to save the bay. Joined by a trio of hotshot recruits, including former Olympian Matt Brody, they ditch the surf and go deep under cover to take down a ruthless businesswoman whose devious plans threaten the future of the bay.

programme.title: Criminal Law
programme.desc: Up-and-coming Boston attorney Ben Chase successfully defends wealthy Martin Thiel on the charge of a particularly vicious murder. Within 24 hours, another similarly styled murder occurs -- with a new twist that allows Chase to realize he has allowed a guilty man to run free. Chase is startled when Thiel contacts him, requesting he defend him again. Recklessly agreeing in order to gather evidence against Thiel, Chase is soon dragged into the killer's twisted game.

programme.title: Tommy's Honour
programme.desc: Tom and Tommy Morris, father and son pioneers of professional golf, relied on skill, business acumen and working-class street smarts to make Tommy one of the world's first sports superstars and found the modern game of golf.

programme.title: The Ladies' Man
programme.desc: Upon losing his lover, Herbert (Jerry Lewis) gives up women for good and seeks a fresh start by taking a maintenance position at what appears to be an ordinary Los Angeles boarding house. To Herbert's surprise, however, the building caters specifically to single women. He immediately resolves to quit, but landlady Miss Wellenmellon (Helen Traubel) and sweet tenant Fay (Pat Stanley) talk him into keeping the job. In no time at all, Herbert is mired in one comic disaster after another.

programme.title: Benny & Joon
programme.desc: Benny (Aidan Quinn), who cares for his mentally disturbed sister, Joon (Mary Stuart Masterson), also welcomes the eccentric Sam (Johnny Depp) into his home at Joon's request. Sam entertains Joon while he dreams of a job at the video store. Once Benny realizes Joon and Sam have started a relationship, he kicks Sam out of the house. This leads to an altercation between brother and sister. Joon runs away with Sam, who soon realizes that she may need more support than he alone can provide.

programme.title: Four Weddings and a Funeral
programme.desc: Lovable Englishman Charles and his group of friends seem to be unlucky in love. When Charles meets a beautiful American named Carrie at a wedding, he thinks his luck may have changed. But, after one magical night, Carrie returns to the States, ending what might have been. As Charles and Carrie's paths continue to cross -- over a handful of nuptials and one funeral -- he comes to believe they are meant to be together, even if their timing always seems to be off.

programme.title: The Birdcage
programme.desc: In Miami Beach, a gay couple pretend to be man and wife when a son's future father-in-law and family visit.

programme.title: The Big Short
programme.desc: In 2008, Wall Street guru Michael Burry realizes that a number of subprime home loans are in danger of defaulting. Burry bets against the housing market by throwing more than $1 billion of his investors' money into credit default swaps. His actions attract the attention of banker Jared Vennett (Ryan Gosling), hedge-fund specialist Mark Baum (Steve Carell) and other greedy opportunists. Together, these men make a fortune by taking full advantage of the impending economic collapse in America.

programme.title: The Truman Show
programme.desc: He doesn't know it, but everything in Truman Burbank's (Jim Carrey) life is part of a massive TV set. Executive producer Christof (Ed Harris) orchestrates "The Truman Show," a live broadcast of Truman's every move captured by hidden cameras. Christof tries to control Truman's mind, even removing his true love, Sylvia (Natascha McElhone), from the show and replacing her with Meryl (Laura Linney). As Truman gradually discovers the truth, however, he must decide whether to act on it.

programme.title: Daddy's Home 2
programme.desc: Father and stepfather Dusty and Brad join forces to make Christmastime perfect for the children. Their newfound partnership soon gets put to the test when Dusty's old-school, macho dad and Brad's gentle father arrive to turn the holiday upside down. After a sudden change in plans, the four men decide to take the kids to a luxury resort for a fun-filled getaway that turns into a hilariously chaotic adventure.

programme.title: Failure to Launch
programme.desc: A young man (Matthew McConaughey) continues to live at the home of parents who, in desperation to push him out of the nest once and for all, hatch a plan. They hire a beautiful woman (Sarah Jessica Parker) to entice him to assume the mantle of responsibility and get his own place.

programme.title: The Naked Gun
programme.desc: Following in the footsteps of his bumbling father, Detective Frank Drebin Jr. must solve a murder case to prevent Police Squad from shutting down.

programme.title: From
programme.desc: A new arrival throws the town into chaos; Jade and Tabitha struggle with their revelation at the Bottle Tree; Boyd grapples with the implications of Smiley's return.

programme.title: From
programme.desc: A gruesome discovery sends shockwaves through the town as Jade and Tabitha struggle with the weight of their revelation.

programme.title: Torn Hearts
programme.desc: A country music duo seek out the private mansion of their idol and end up in a twisted series of horrors that force them to confront the limits they'd go for their dreams.

programme.title: Sleepover
programme.desc: In the summer before starting high school, Julie (Alexa Vega) and her best friends, Hannah (Mika Boorem), Yancy (Kallie Flynn Childress) and Farrah (Scout Taylor-Compton), have a slumber party. They decide they're going to use the night to shed their nerdy reputations, and they end up in a scavenger hunt against a group of "popular" girls. To win, Julie and her friends have to steal a car and a boy's underpants and sneak into a nightclub, all without Julie's mom (Jane Lynch) finding out.

programme.title: The Great Gatsby
programme.desc: Nick Carraway (Sam Waterston) is a young man from the Midwest living modestly among the decadent mansions of 1920s Long Island. He becomes involved in the life of the mysterious Jay Gatsby (Robert Redford), a rich man who throws the most lavish parties on the island. But behind Gastby's outgoing demeanor is a lonely man who wants nothing more than to be with his old love, Daisy (Mia Farrow). She is married to the bullheaded Tom (Bruce Dern), creating a love triangle that will end in tragedy.

programme.title: Love Story
programme.desc: When wealthy Harvard University law student Oliver Barrett IV meets Jenny Cavilleri, a middle-class girl who is studying music at Radcliffe College, it's love at first sight. Despite the protests of Oliver's father, the young couple marry. Oliver finds a job at a legal firm in New York City, but their happy life comes crashing down when it's discovered that Jenny has a terminal illness. Together, they try to cope with the situation as best they can.

programme.title: The Ten Commandments
programme.desc: Enjoying a life of ease in the court of Egypt's pharaoh, Moses (Charlton Heston) discovers his Hebrew heritage and, later, God's expectations of him. He dedicates himself to liberating his people from captivity and -- with the aid of plagues and divine intervention -- manages to lead them out of Egypt and across the Red Sea. A greater challenge comes in the form of the golden calf idol, however, and it takes an unforgettable visitation by God on Mount Sinai for Moses' mission to prevail.

programme.title: Explorers
programme.desc: Young Ben Crandall (Ethan Hawke) spends his free time watching sci-fi films, playing video games and reading comic books. Surprisingly, his affinity for all things fantastical yields a real result -- when he has a vivid dream about technology, his science-loving friend Wolfgang Muller (River Phoenix) manages to create a working spacecraft. Joined by their buddy Darren Woods (Jason Presson), the boys take off into outer space and encounter some very odd extraterrestrial life.

programme.title: Virtuosity
programme.desc: A former cop who has been imprisoned for murdering the psychopath who killed his family, Parker Barnes (Denzel Washington) is recruited to test out a new virtual-reality program where the goal is to apprehend a computer-generated being called SID 6.7 (Russell Crowe), who has been modeled on hundreds of deranged criminals. When SID manages to escape into the real world, Barnes must capture or destroy him before the soulless entity can go on a killing spree.

programme.title: From
programme.desc: A gruesome discovery sends shockwaves through the town as Jade and Tabitha struggle with the weight of their revelation.

programme.title: Terminator 2: Judgment Day
programme.desc: In this sequel set eleven years after "The Terminator," young John Connor (Edward Furlong), the key to civilization's victory over a future robot uprising, is the target of the shape-shifting T-1000 (Robert Patrick), a Terminator sent from the future to kill him. Another Terminator, the revamped T-800 (Arnold Schwarzenegger), has been sent back to protect the boy. As John and his mother (Linda Hamilton) go on the run with the T-800, the boy forms an unexpected bond with the robot.

programme.title: Mercy
programme.desc: In the near future, an advanced AI judge tells a captive detective that he's on trial for the murder of his wife. If he fails to prove his innocence within 90 minutes, he'll be executed on the spot.

programme.title: Project Almanac
programme.desc: David Raskin is a high-school science nerd who dreams of going to MIT. When he and his friends find his late father's plans for a "temporal displacement device," David can't wait to start tinkering. When they finally get the device to work, the teenagers jump at the opportunity to manipulate time in their favor -- but their joy is short-lived when they begin to discover the consequences of their actions.

programme.title: Leviathan
programme.desc: Hired by Martin (Meg Foster), the head of a major corporation, a crew including geologist Steven Beck (Peter Weller) descends to the ocean's depths for a mining project. When the undersea explorers find a sunken ship and investigate, they inadvertently bring a malevolent life form on board their vessel. The creature kills some crew members and causes them to mutate, resulting in a battle for survival against an unknown force far below the surface of the ocean.

programme.title: From
programme.desc: A gruesome discovery sends shockwaves through the town as Jade and Tabitha struggle with the weight of their revelation.

programme.title: Sex Life
programme.desc: A new way to mix love and art; going high tech with long-distance lovers.

programme.title: American Refugee
programme.desc: With the American economy in collapse and the nation under martial law, a family seeks shelter in their neighbor's bunker, where the danger inside is potentially greater than the danger outside.

programme.title: The Burning
programme.desc: At summer camp, some teenagers pull a prank on the camp's caretaker, Cropsy (Lou David). But the joke goes terribly wrong, and the teens leave Cropsy for dead after setting him on fire. But no one keeps Cropsy down. A few years later, the burned and disfigured caretaker returns to camp equipped with his trusty shears, ready to unleash his particular brand of vengeance on a whole new group of teens. The murderous Cropsy stalks the campers in the woods, one by one.

programme.title: Boo 2! A Madea Halloween
programme.desc: Tiffany travels to Derrick Lake to celebrate her 18th birthday at a Halloween frat party in the middle of the woods. Frantic and worried, Madea, Aunt Bam and Hattie hop in the car to save her from the same terrible fate that befell a group of teens there years earlier. Chaos soon strikes when the would-be heroes find themselves fighting for their lives against an array of spooky monsters, goblins and boogeymen.

programme.title: Bad News Bears
programme.desc: Morris Buttermaker is a burned-out minor league baseball player who loves to drink and can't keep his hands to himself. His long-suffering lawyer arranges for him to manage a local Little League team, and Buttermaker soon finds himself the head of a rag-tag group of misfit players. Through unconventional team-building exercises and his offbeat coaching style, Buttermaker helps his hapless Bears prepare to meet their rivals, the Yankees.

programme.title: The Cutting Edge
programme.desc: Stuck-up figure skating whiz Kate Moseley (Moira Kelly) is denied a gold medal at the 1988 Olympics after a fall. As Kate drives off partner after partner, her coach, Anton (Roy Dotrice), must quickly find her a new one in order to be ready for the next Olympics. Enter arrogant former Olympic hockey player Doug Dorsey (D.B. Sweeney), who briefly encountered Kate years before. Reluctantly teaming up, Kate and Doug's icy rapport begins to thaw, resulting in a chemistry both in and out of the rink.

programme.title: The Fire Inside
programme.desc: The story of Claressa "T-Rex" Shields, a boxer from Flint, Mich., who trained to become the first woman in her country's history to win an Olympic gold medal in the sport.

programme.title: Coach Carter
programme.desc: In 1999, Ken Carter (Samuel L. Jackson) returns to his old high school in Richmond, California, to get the basketball team into shape. With tough rules and academic discipline, he succeeds in setting the players on a winning streak. But when their grades start to suffer, Carter locks them out of the gym and shuts down their championship season. When he is criticized by the players and their parents, he sticks to his guns, determined that they excel in class as well as on the court.

programme.title: North Dallas Forty
programme.desc: A brutal satire of American professional football in which a veteran pass-catcher's individuality and refusal to become part of the team family is bitterly resented by his disciplinarian coaches. The National Football League refused to help in the production of this movie, suggesting it may have been too near the truth for comfort. From the novel by former NFL player Peter Gent.

programme.title: Ocean's Eleven
programme.desc: Dapper Danny Ocean is a man of action. Less than 24 hours into his parole from a New Jersey penitentiary, the wry, charismatic thief is already rolling out his next plan. Following three rules: Don't hurt anybody, don't steal from anyone who doesn't deserve it, and play the game like you've got nothing to lose. Danny orchestrates the most sophisticated, elaborate casino heist in history.

programme.title: Scarface
programme.desc: After getting a green card in exchange for assassinating a Cuban government official, Tony Montana (Al Pacino) stakes a claim on the drug trade in Miami. Viciously murdering anyone who stands in his way, Tony eventually becomes the biggest drug lord in the state, controlling nearly all the cocaine that comes through Miami. But increased pressure from the police, wars with Colombian drug cartels and his own drug-fueled paranoia serve to fuel the flames of his eventual downfall.

programme.title: The Hospital
programme.desc: Herbert Bock (George C. Scott), the chief of medicine in a New York City teaching hospital, is contemplating suicide; he's impotent, his wife has left him, and his children aren't speaking to him. His hospital is also suffering from a recent spate of inexplicable deaths. In the midst of these setbacks, Bock is romantically drawn to the much younger Barbara (Diana Rigg), whose father is a patient. As Barbara restores Bock's will to live, it turns out that the hospital deaths are murders.

programme.title: Guns of the Magnificent Seven
programme.desc: When Quintero (Fernando Rey), a Mexican revolutionary leader, is left to rot in jail by the forces of President Diaz, it's up to his subordinate, Max (Reni Santoni), to bust him out. With $600 in hand, he crosses the border into America and hires Chris Adams (George Kennedy), a mercenary of considerable skill, who uses the rest of the cash on more hired guns. After the team is rounded out by experts on close-combat fighting, explosives and knife-throwing, they set off to free Quintero.

programme.title: Yours, Mine and Ours
programme.desc: Navy officer Frank Beardsley (Henry Fonda) is struggling to raise his 10 children in the wake of his wife's death. Frank soon begins dating Helen North (Lucille Ball), a widowed nurse with eight children of her own. After learning of their similar situations, the two are reluctant to pursue a relationship. But with the help of a mutual friend, Darrel Harrison (Van Johnson), the two eventually fall in love and must decide about forming one big, unconventional family.

programme.title: American Refugee
programme.desc: With the American economy in collapse and the nation under martial law, a family seeks shelter in their neighbor's bunker, where the danger inside is potentially greater than the danger outside.

programme.title: Silence
programme.desc: Two 17th-century Portuguese missionaries, Father Sebastian Rodrigues (Andrew Garfield) and Father Francisco Garupe (Adam Driver), embark on a perilous journey to Japan to find their missing mentor (Liam Neeson). While there, the two men minister to the Christian villagers who worship in secret. If caught by feudal lords or ruling samurai, they must renounce their faith or face a prolonged and agonizing death.

programme.title: Hoosiers
programme.desc: Failed college coach Norman Dale gets a chance at redemption when he is hired to direct the basketball program at a high school in a tiny Indiana town. After a teacher persuades star player Jimmy Chitwood to quit and focus on his long-neglected studies, Dale struggles to develop a winning team in the face of community criticism for his temper and his unconventional choice of assistant coach: Shooter, a notorious alcoholic.

programme.title: The Good, the Bad and the Ugly
programme.desc: In the Southwest during the Civil War, a mysterious stranger, Joe (Clint Eastwood), and a Mexican outlaw, Tuco (Eli Wallach), form an uneasy partnership -- Joe turns in the bandit for the reward money, then rescues him just as he is being hanged. When Joe's shot at the noose goes awry during one escapade, a furious Tuco tries to have him murdered. The men re-team abruptly, however, to beat out a sadistic criminal and the Union army and find $20,000 that a soldier has buried in the desert.

programme.title: To Live and Die in L.A.
programme.desc: When his longtime partner on the force is killed, reckless U.S. Secret Service agent Richard Chance (William L. Petersen) vows revenge, setting out to nab dangerous counterfeit artist Eric Masters (Willem Dafoe). Along with his new, straitlaced partner, John Vukovich (John Pankow), Chance sets up a scheme to entrap Masters, resulting in the accidental death of an undercover officer. As Chance's desire for justice becomes an obsession, Vukovich questions the lawless methods he employs.

programme.title: We Were Soldiers
programme.desc: Based upon the best-selling book "We Were Soldiers Once ... and Young" by Lt. Gen. Harold G. Moore (Ret.) and journalist Joseph L. Galloway, this compelling war drama depicts the true story of the first major battle between the United States and North Vietnamese forces. It is a film about uncommon valor and nobility under fire, loyalty among soldiers, and the heroism and sacrifice of men and women both home and abroad.

programme.title: From
programme.desc: A gruesome discovery sends shockwaves through the town as Jade and Tabitha struggle with the weight of their revelation.

programme.title: The Running Man
programme.desc: In the near future, "The Running Man" is the top-rated show on television, a deadly competition where contestants must survive 30 days while being hunted by professional assassins. Desperate for money to save his sick daughter, Ben Richards is convinced by the show's ruthless producer to enter the game as a last resort. Ratings soon skyrocket as Ben's defiance, instincts and grit turn him into an unexpected fan favorite, as well as a threat to the entire system.

programme.title: Independence Day
programme.desc: In the epic adventure film "Independence Day," strange phenomena surface around the globe. The skies ignite. Terror races through the world's major cities. As these extraordinary events unfold, it becomes increasingly clear that a force of incredible magnitude has arrived; its mission: total annihilation over the Fourth of July weekend. The last hope to stop the destruction is an unlikely group of people united by fate and unimaginable circumstances.

programme.title: Below
programme.desc: The submarine U.S.S. Manta had a perfect record until the mysterious death of its captain. The next-in-command, Lt. Richard Brice (Bruce Greenwood) is determined to steer his disheartened crew back to safety. But after three battle survivors board the sub, bizarre and frightening things begin to happen. As the tale unfolds, and crew members begin to disappear, Ensign Douglas O'Dell (Matthew Davis) must piece together the puzzles of the submarine's past before it is too late to resurface alive.

programme.title: Species III
programme.desc: After she delivers her child in an ambulance, alien Eve (Natasha Henstridge) is killed by a half-breed. Fortunately, Dr. Abbot (Robert Knepper) scoops up the baby alien and escapes. In time, the baby grows into a gorgeous blonde named Sara (Sunny Mabrey) and begins her quest to find a worthy mate. But Sara is also savage and leaves a trail of deaths in her wake. This carnage makes chemistry student Dean (Robin Dunne) question whether to help her race or not.

programme.title: The Desperate Hours
programme.desc: Three escaped felons (Humphrey Bogart, Dewey Martin, Robert Middleton) randomly target a suburban house to hide out in until midnight, when an accomplice plans to deliver them money. They take the entire family hostage -- but midnight comes and goes without a delivery. As their stay extends from hours into days, homeowner Dan Hilliard (Fredric March) complies with the felons' no-police demands to protect his wife and two children, while trying to plot an escape from the desperate situation.

programme.title: Chaplin
programme.desc: Re-creation of the life of comic genius Charlie Chaplin, from his humble beginnings in south London through his early days in British vaudeville, his silent movie career in America and his late masterpieces. His turbulent personal life saw four marriages and an enforced exile from the US - though he returned to receive an honorary Oscar in 1972.

programme.title: Dark Blue
programme.desc: Set in the Los Angeles Police Department in 1992, "Dark Blue" is a thriller that takes place just days before the acquittal of four white officers in the beating of black motorist Rodney King and the subsequent L.A. riots. In this racially charged climate, the LAPD's elite Special Investigations Squad is assigned a quadruple homicide. As they work the case, detective Eldon (Kurt Russell), tutors SIS rookie Bobby (Scott Speedman) in the realities of police intimidation and corruption.

programme.title: Navy SEALS
programme.desc: Navy special operations forces go to the Middle East to free a helicopter crew taken captive by terrorist Ben Shaheed (Nicholas Kadi). After learning that Shaheed has killed a hostage and acquired missiles on the black market, Lt. James Curran (Michael Biehn) and Lt. Dale Hawkins (Charlie Sheen) consult with a reporter who is an expert on Shaheed and his motives. As Shaheed embarks on his plan to violently derail regional treaty talks, the special operations forces make their move.

programme.title: Young Sherlock Holmes
programme.desc: A teenage Sherlock Holmes (Nicholas Rowe) meets and befriends his future sidekick, the bemused and bespectacled John Watson (Alan Cox). During their first semester of boarding school, a series of deaths occur on campus. Intrigued by the crime, Holmes looks into it and soon comes to suspect a poisonous hallucinogen. And then, in the midst of their investigation, Holmes and Watson stumble on a bizarre cult with a penchant for human sacrifice -- after which they must struggle to escape.

programme.title: The Man in the Iron Mask
programme.desc: The musketeers rescue their king's true heir from the Bastille.

programme.title: Rob Roy
programme.desc: In 18th century Scotland, Robert Roy MacGregor (Liam Neeson) is the head of a proud Highlands clan that herds cattle. Rob takes a one thousand pound loan from the Marquis of Montrose (John Hurt) to feed his people through the upcoming winter -- before his friend MacDonald (Eric Stoltz) can return with the money, he is murdered by swordsman Archibald Cunningham (Tim Roth). Rob is forced to go on the run and eventually confronts Cunningham after he rapes his wife (Jessica Lange).

programme.title: Schindler's List
programme.desc: Businessman Oskar Schindler arrives in Kraków in 1939, ready to make his fortune from World War II, which has just started. After joining the Nazi party primarily for political expediency, he staffs his factory with Jewish workers for similarly pragmatic reasons. When the SS begins exterminating Jews in the Kraków ghetto, Schindler arranges to have his workers protected to keep his factory in operation, but soon realizes that in so doing, he is also saving innocent lives.

programme.title: The Doors
programme.desc: After a psychedelic experience in the California desert, Jim Morrison (Val Kilmer), lead singer of The Doors, and his bandmates begin performing in Los Angeles and quickly become a sensation. However, when Jim begins ditching his musical responsibilities and his girlfriend, Pamela (Meg Ryan), in favor of his dangerous addictions and the affections of the seductive, occult-obsessed Patricia (Kathleen Quinlan), the band starts to worry about their leader.

programme.title: From
programme.desc: A gruesome discovery sends shockwaves through the town as Jade and Tabitha struggle with the weight of their revelation.

programme.title: The Return of the Pink Panther
programme.desc: After he lets a robbery transpire right under his nose, the ever-bumbling Inspector Clouseau is suspended by Chief Inspector Dreyfus. But, when the famed Pink Panther diamond is stolen from the National Museum in Lugash, the Shah requests Clouseau's assistance, and he's reinstated. Clouseau quickly concludes that the thief must be the infamous Phantom, against whom he has a grudge, but the inspector's instincts are, as usual, wrong.

programme.title: Breakfast at Tiffany's
programme.desc: Based on Truman Capote's novel, this is the story of a young woman in New York City who meets a young man when he moves into her apartment building. He is with an older woman who is very wealthy, but he wants to be a writer. She is working as an expensive escort and searching for a rich, older man to marry.

programme.title: The Passenger
programme.desc: Randy is perfectly content to fade into the background, but when one of his co-workers goes on a sudden and violent rampage, he must face his fears and confront his troubled past to survive.

programme.title: Preparation for the Next Life
programme.desc: A Uyghur woman moves to New York City where she finds herself laboring in Chinatown's underground kitchens. She fatefully encounters Skinner, a young American soldier who's just returned from three tours in the Middle East. As they start to fall in love, they discover the possibility of a better life together than the ones they believed they were destined to live alone.

programme.title: There Will Be Blood
programme.desc: Silver miner Daniel Plainview (Daniel Day-Lewis) leads a hardscrabble life with his son, H.W. (Dillon Freasier). When he hears about oil oozing from the ground near the Western town of Little Boston, Daniel takes his son on a mission to find their fortune. Daniel makes his lucky strike and becomes a self-made tycoon but, as his fortune grows, he deviates into moral bankruptcy.

A man loses his identity while living under a repressive regime. In a story based on George Orwell's classic novel, Winston Smith (John Hurt) is a government employee whose job involves the rewriting of history in a manner that casts his fictional country's leaders in a charitable light. His trysts with Julia (Suzanna Hamilton) provide his only measure of enjoyment, but lawmakers frown on the relationship -- and in this closely monitored society, there is no escape from Big Brother.

Earth's billions of inhabitants are unaware that the planet has an expiration date. With the warnings of an American scientist (Chiwetel Ejiofor), world leaders begin secret preparations for the survival of select members of society. When the global cataclysm finally occurs, failed writer Jackson Curtis (John Cusack) tries to lead his family to safety as the world starts falling apart.

programme.title: Transformers: The Last Knight
programme.desc: Humans are at war with the Transformers, and Optimus Prime is gone. The key to saving the future lies buried in the secrets of the past and the hidden history of Transformers on Earth. Now, it's up to the unlikely alliance of inventor Cade Yeager, Bumblebee, an English lord and an Oxford professor to save the world.

programme.title: Dark Blue
programme.desc: Set in the Los Angeles Police Department in 1992, "Dark Blue" is a thriller that takes place just days before the acquittal of four white officers in the beating of black motorist Rodney King and the subsequent L.A. riots. In this racially charged climate, the LAPD's elite Special Investigations Squad is assigned a quadruple homicide. As they work the case, detective Eldon (Kurt Russell), tutors SIS rookie Bobby (Scott Speedman) in the realities of police intimidation and corruption.

programme.title: Rage of Honor
programme.desc: An Arizona narcotics officer (Shô Kosugi) goes to Argentina with his girlfriend to track down a drug lord.

programme.title: The Octagon
programme.desc: Scott James (Chuck Norris), a veteran martial arts expert, is recruited as the protector of the wealthy and beautiful Justine (Karen Carlson) after she becomes the target of a ninja clan. When Scott finds out that his ruthless arch nemesis, McCarn (Lee Van Cleef), is involved with the stealthy and dangerous criminals, he is eager to settle old scores. Soon Scott is facing off against McCarn and the entire ninja horde in an effort to take them all down.

programme.title: Breaker! Breaker!
programme.desc: Tough guy trucker J.D. Dawes (Chuck Norris) drives his big rig to a little desert town and smack into the middle of a cesspool of criminality -- all to rescue his brother, Billy (Michael Augenstein), who has been kidnapped. But the perpetrators are not ordinary criminals. A wicked public servant, Judge Joshua Trimmings (George Murdock), runs the town and especially hates truckers. The judge and his minions do their best to break Dawes down. But Dawes retaliates with swift, severe vengeance.

programme.title: The Taking of Pelham One Two Three
The Man in the Iron Mask
Midnight Cowboy
programme.desc: Convinced of his irresistible appeal to women, Texas dishwasher Joe Buck (Jon Voight) quits his job and heads for New York City, thinking he'll latch on to some rich dowager. New York, however, is not as hospitable as he imagined, and Joe soon finds himself living in an abandoned building with a Dickensian layabout named Enrico "Ratso" Rizzo (Dustin Hoffman). The two form a rough alliance, and together they kick-start Joe's hustling career just as Ratso's health begins to deteriorate.

programme.title: Midnight Cowboy
programme.desc: Convinced of his irresistible appeal to women, Texas dishwasher Joe Buck (Jon Voight) quits his job and heads for New York City, thinking he'll latch on to some rich dowager. The two form a rough alliance, and together they kick-start Joe's hustling career just as Ratso's health begins to deteriorate.
