programme.title: Dracula
programme.desc: This was made at night using the same sets and script as the Bela Lugosi classic but with a Spanish cast.","large":"Soon after beginning work for Conde Dracula (Carlos Villarias), the clerk Renfield (Pablo Alvarez Rubio) learns that his employer is, in fact, a vampire who lives on human blood. Now under Dracula's spell, Renfield helps his master travel to London, where the vampire takes another victim (Carmen Guerrero). Dracula also has eyes on the lovely Eva (Lupita Tovar), but her fiancé, Juan Harker (Barry Norton), and a wise professor named Van Helsing (Eduardo Arozamena) seek to stop him.

programme.title: Dracula's Daughter
programme.desc: A vampire countess (Gloria Holden) in black falls in love with a psychologist (Otto Kruger) and kidnaps his fiancée (Marguerite Churchill).","large":"Although Count Dracula was destroyed by Van Helsing (Edward Van Sloan), who is now being tried for his murder, Dracula's daughter, the Countess Marya Zaleska (Gloria Holden), is still alive -- and her father's death has brought her no closer to eradicating her vampiric thirst for blood. When attempts to free herself of the disease fail, she turns to psychiatrist Dr. Garth (Otto Kruger) for assistance, but soon finds herself struggling with the desire to make him one of the undead as well.

programme.title: The Evil of Frankenstein
programme.desc: The baron (Peter Cushing) and a hypnotist (Peter Woodthorpe) bring the creature out of ice, horrifying villagers of Karlsbad.","large":"Dr. Frankenstein (Peter Cushing) returns destitute to his home village to recommence his experimental research into the reanimation of dead tissue, and stumbles upon his old monster suspended in ice. Though he revives the creature, Frankenstein must seek the help of hypnotist Zoltan (Peter Woodthorpe) to repair its mind. Zoltan then assumes control of the monster, using him to wreak havoc. But when Frankenstein tries to regain power over his creation, he becomes Zoltan's next target.

programme.title: Frankenstein
programme.desc: Baron Frankenstein creates a monster from cadavers and a killer's brain.

programme.title: Frankenstein Meets the Wolfman
programme.desc: Tormented werewolf Larry Talbot (Lon Chaney Jr.) calls on Dr. Frankenstein and finds his monster (Bela Lugosi) instead.","large":"Lawrence Stewart Talbot (Lon Chaney Jr.) is plagued by a physical oddity that turns him into a crazed werewolf after sundown. His desire to rid himself of this ailment leads him to the castle owned by mad scientist Dr. Frankenstein. Frankenstein, it turns out, is now dead, yet Talbot believes that the scientist's daughter, Baroness Elsa Frankenstein (Ilona Massey), can help him. However, his quest to right himself puts him on a collision course with Frankenstein's monster (Bela Lugosi).

programme.title: The Frozen Ghost
programme.desc: When famous radio hypnotist Alex Gregor (Lon Chaney Jr.) accidentally causes the death of an audience member during a broadcast, his guilt leads him to break off his engagement to Maura Daniel (Evelyn Ankers) and take a job at a wax museum.","large":"When famous radio hypnotist Alex Gregor (Lon Chaney Jr.) accidentally causes the death of an audience member during a broadcast, his guilt leads him to break off his engagement to Maura Daniel (Evelyn Ankers) and take a job at a wax museum. Jealousy over the attention paid to his new co-worker causes mentally unbalanced sculptor Rudi Poldan (Martin Kosleck) to lash out at museum owner Valerie Monet (Tala Birell) and her niece Nina (Elena Verdugo) in a horrifying fashion.

programme.title: The Funhouse
programme.desc: Naughty teens (Elizabeth Berridge, Cooper Huckabee, Miles Chapin) are locked in a carnival fun house with a man in a Frankenstein mask.","large":"Rebellious teen Amy (Elizabeth Berridge) defies her parents by going to a trashy carnival that has pulled into town. In tow are her boyfriend, Buzz (Cooper Huckabee), and their friends Liz (Largo Woodruff) and Richie (Miles Chapin). Thinking it would be fun to spend the night in the campy Funhouse horror ride, the teens witness a murder by a deformed worker wearing a mask. Locked in, Amy and her friends must evade the murderous carnival workers and escape before it leaves town the next day.

programme.title: The Ghost of Frankenstein
programme.desc: Shepherd Igor rescues the monster from a sulfur pit and brings him to Dr. Frankenstein's other son.

programme.title: Halloween II
programme.desc: A killer follows his injured target (Jamie Lee Curtis) to the hospital on Oct. 31 in Haddonfield, Ill.","large":"After failing to kill stubborn survivor Laurie (Jamie Lee Curtis) and taking a bullet or six from former psychiatrist Dr. Sam Loomis (Donald Pleasence), Michael Myers (Jonathan Prince) has followed Laurie to the Haddonfield Memorial Hospital, where she's been admitted for Myers' attempt on her life. The institution proves to be particularly suited to serial killers, however, as Myers cuts, stabs and slashes his way through hospital staff to reach his favorite victim.

programme.title: House of Dracula
programme.desc: A scientist (Onslow Stevens) helps the Wolf Man (Lon Chaney) and Dracula (John Carradine), and revives Frankenstein's monster.","large":"This monster movie focuses on the iconic vampire, Count Dracula (John Carradine), and Lawrence Talbot (Lon Chaney), better known as the Wolf Man. Both beings of the night are tired of their supernatural afflictions, so they seek out Dr. Franz Edelmann (Onslow Stevens) for cures for their respective curses. While trying to aid the imposing creatures, Edelmann himself develops a transformative condition, adding to the many ghouls lurking around the foreboding landscape.

programme.title: House of Frankenstein
programme.desc: A mad doctor (Boris Karloff) and his hunchbacked helper (J. Carrol Naish) revive Dracula, the Wolf Man (Lon Chaney) and the Frankenstein monster.","large":"After escaping from prison, the evil Dr. Niemann (Boris Karloff) and his hunchbacked assistant, Daniel (J. Carrol Naish), plot their revenge against those who imprisoned them. For this, they recruit the powerful Wolf Man (Lon Chaney), Frankenstein's monster (Glenn Strange) and even Dracula himself (John Carradine). Niemann pursues those who wrong him, sending each monster out to do his dirty work. But his control on the monsters is weak at best and may prove to be his downfall.

programme.title: House of Horrors
programme.desc: An insane sculptor sends the disfigured criminal he saved from drowning to kill the critics who denounced him.

programme.title: The Incredible Shrinking Man
programme.desc: Exposure to a mysterious fog causes a man (Grant Williams) to shrink, making the world around him extremely hazardous.","large":"While on a boating trip, Scott Carey (Grant Williams) is exposed to a radioactive cloud. Nothing seems amiss at first, but several months later Scott realizes that he's shrunk in height by several inches. He sees a doctor, who admits that he's baffled. As Scott continues to shrink, decreasing to three feet tall, he becomes bitter, and lashes out at his wife, Louise (Randy Stuart). He begins to fear a cure will never be found -- since even as he becomes a national sensation, he's still shrinking.

programme.title: The Invisible Man
programme.desc: The serum that makes a scientist (Claude Rains) invisible has madness as a side effect.

programme.title: The Invisible Man Returns
programme.desc: A man (Vincent Price) framed for murder uses a serum to become invisible, then escapes to find the killer.","large":"Wrongly accused of murdering his brother, Geoffrey Radcliffe (Vincent Price) is found guilty and sentenced to die. But when sympathetic Dr. Griffin (John Sutton) injects him with a serum that renders him invisible, Radcliffe is able to escape and search for the real culprit. With Inspector Sampson (Cecil Kellaway) of Scotland Yard hot on his trail, Radcliffe begins to suspect that a recent hire in his family's mining company might have the answers he seeks.

programme.title: The Invisible Man's Revenge
programme.desc: A criminal (Jon Hall) haunts his enemies' mansion after a mad scientist (John Carradine) makes him invisible.

programme.title: The Invisible Ray
programme.desc: A scientist (Bela Lugosi) seeks an antidote for a radium-poisoned colleague (Boris Karloff) with the touch of death.

programme.title: The Invisible Woman
programme.desc: A screwy professor's experiments with a gorgeous model attract the attentions of a gangster and a handsome millionaire.

programme.title: Island of Lost Souls
programme.desc: White-suited Dr. Moreau (Charles Laughton) herds his bestial mutants and plots to mate his panther-woman with a visitor (Richard Arlen).","large":"In this adaptation of H.G. Wells' novel "The Island of Doctor Moreau," Edward Parker (Richard Arlen) is shipwrecked on a remote island presided over by the mysterious Dr. Moreau (Charles Laughton). Edward discovers his host is conducting genetic experiments, and presiding over a race of half-human, half-animal hybrids, including the alluring Panther Woman and the sage Sayer of the Law (Bela Lugosi). The island has become its own society, with Moreau as its god.

programme.title: It Came From Outer Space
programme.desc: Based on a Ray Bradbury short story about an astronomer's encounter with extraterrestrials in the Arizona desert.","large":"While looking through his telescope one night, John Putnam (Richard Carlson) sees what at first appears to be a meteor shower -- but it is actually a crash-landing alien spaceship! After investigating the crater from the impact, John informs the town sheriff (Charles Drake), and receives nothing but ridicule. Even his fiancée, Ellen (Barbara Rush), is skeptical. All that changes when the townsfolk start disappearing, and are replaced by eerie alien duplicates.

programme.title: Kiss of the Vampire
programme.desc: A professor (Clifford Evans) in black rescues stranded 1910 newlyweds from a Bavarian doctor's (Noel Willman) vampire villa.

programme.title: The Mad Doctor of Market Street
programme.desc: A fugitive doctor (Lionel Atwill) tries to raise the dead for South Sea Islanders.

programme.title: The Mad Ghoul
programme.desc: A mad scientist (George Zucco) turns his assistant (David Bruce) into a zombie as part of a plan to steal his assistant's lover (Evelyn Ankers).

programme.title: Man-Made Monster
programme.desc: A mad scientist (Lionel Atwill) makes an electric man (Lon Chaney Jr.) who glows and must wear a rubber suit.

programme.title: The Monster and the Girl
programme.desc: A mad scientist creates a monster when he transplants the brain of an executed murderer into the body of an ape.

programme.title: Monster on the Campus
programme.desc: A professor turns into a Neanderthal killer after injecting himself with the blood of an ancient fish.

programme.title: The Mummy
programme.desc: An Egyptian mummy (Boris Karloff) searches Cairo for the girl (Zita Johann) he thinks is his long-lost princess.","large":"A team of British archaeologists led by Sir Joseph Whemple discover the mummified remains of the ancient Egyptian prince Imhotep, along with the legendary scroll of Thoth. When one of the archaeologists recites the scroll aloud, Imhotep returns to life, but escapes. Several years later, Imhotep has taken on the guise of a wealthy man, as he searches Egypt for his lost love, who he believes has been reincarnated as the lovely Helen Grosvenor.

programme.title: The Mummy's Curse
programme.desc: A mummy (Lon Chaney Jr.) and his princess (Virginia Christine) roam the Louisiana bayou.

programme.title: The Mummy's Ghost
programme.desc: A 3000-year-old limping mummy (Lon Chaney) seeks his reincarnated princess (Ramsay Ames) in a Midwestern college town.

programme.title: The Mummy's Hand
programme.desc: Archaeologists (Dick Foran, Wallace Ford) defile the tomb of mummified Kharis, who was buried alive for falling in love with an Egyptian princess.","large":"In Cairo, archaeologist Steve Banning (Dick Foran) unearths a vase that he believes could lead him to the ancient tomb of Princess Ananka. Unknown to Steve, his colleague, Professor Andoheb (George Zucco), is also the High Priest of Karnac who holds the secrets of Karas, a mummy who guards Ananka's tomb. Upon receiving funds from magician Solvani (Cecil Kellaway) and his daughter, Marta (Peggy Moran), Steve and the Solvanis embark on an expedition to the grave site, where Karas awaits.

programme.title: The Mummy's Tomb
programme.desc: Old archaeologist (Dick Foran) recalls mummy (Lon Chaney) at large in New England.

programme.title: Night Creatures
programme.desc: Pirate Captain Clegg (Peter Cushing), an English vicar by day, leads ghostly mounted smugglers by night.

programme.title: Night Monster
programme.desc: A man (Lionel Atwill) uses mind over matter to replace his legs, then hunts the doctors who took them.

programme.title: The Night Walker
programme.desc: A lawyer (Robert Taylor) advises a blind man's rich widow (Barbara Stanwyck) tormented by nightmares.

programme.title: The People Under the Stairs
programme.desc: Hoping to find a fortune in gold, a boy instead discovers the horrific secrets lurking inside the home of two murderous siblings.","large":"When young Fool (Brandon Adams) breaks into the home of his family's greedy and uncaring landlords, he discovers a disturbing scenario where incestuous adult siblings have mutilated a number of boys and kept them imprisoned under stairs in their large, creepy house. As Fool attempts to flee before the psychopaths can catch him, he meets their daughter, Alice (A.J. Langer), who has been spared any extreme discipline by her deranged parents. Can Fool and Alice escape before it's too late?

programme.title: Phantom of the Opera
programme.desc: An acid-scarred composer (Claude Rains) rises from the Paris sewers to boost his favorite opera understudy's (Susanna Foster) career.","large":"Talented Christine (Susanna Foster) is unaware that her singing lessons are being funded by a secret admirer, Enrique (Claude Rains), a mysterious violinist with a disfigured face. Christine's colleagues become suspicious when mysterious accidents start occurring at the Paris Opera House, as the deaths coincide with her meteoric rise to stardom. Christine's suitors, Raoul (Edgar Barrier) and Anatole (Nelson Eddy), brave the dark recesses of the opera house to find the true culprit.

programme.title: Phantom of the Opera
programme.desc: An acid-scarred composer (Herbert Lom) has his dwarf helper bring an opera singer (Heather Sears) to his London sewer hide-out.","large":"Composer Lord Ambrose D'Arcy (Michael Gough) and his backer, Harry Hunter (Edward De Souza), struggle to find a replacement for the female lead in their new opera after she quits in the wake of a gruesome murder. When a new prospect, the nubile Christine Charles (Heather Sears), disappears, Harry cautiously investigates. Meanwhile, a mysterious masked man (Herbert Lom) who is eerily familiar with the opera holds Christine captive and offers to groom her to play the part.

programme.title: Revenge of the Creature
programme.desc: Florida aquarium workers (John Agar, Lori Nelson, John Bromfield) communicate by cattle prod with a captured gill-man.

programme.title: She-Wolf of London
programme.desc: Grisly murders convince a turn-of-the-century Londoner that she is the latest in a long line of werewolves.

programme.title: Son of Dracula
programme.desc: Count Alucard (Lon Chaney) comes out of a lake in his coffin and makes a Southern belle (Louise Allbritton) his bride.

programme.title: Son of Frankenstein
programme.desc: The baron's son (Basil Rathbone) revives his father's monster (Boris Karloff) with help from a broken-necked shepherd called Ygor (Bela Lugosi).","large":"Baron Wolf von Frankenstein is determined to prove the legitimacy of his father's scientific work, thus rescuing the family name from disgrace. With the help of Ygor, a grave robber, Wolf successfully reanimates the monster his father originally brought back from the dead. But when several villagers are killed mysteriously, Wolf must find the culprit in order to vindicate his creation, or face the possibility that he may be responsible.

programme.title: Sssssss
programme.desc: A snake scientist (Strother Martin) turns his daughter's (Heather Menzies) boyfriend (Dirk Benedict), his lab helper, into a big cobra.","large":"Short on cash, undergrad David Blake (Dirk Benedict) takes a job working as a lab assistant for snake expert Dr. Carl Stoner (Strother Martin). When Stoner begins giving David a series of antibiotics as a safeguard against snakebites, he at first thinks nothing of it. But gradually David begins to notice curious changes in his body, and his new girlfriend, Dr. Stoner's daughter, Kristina (Heather Menzies), notices them too. Could Dr. Stoner really be trying to turn his assistant into a snake?

programme.title: Tarantula
programme.desc: Desert scientists (John Agar, Mara Corday, Leo G. Carroll) try to stop a fortified spider the size of a building.

programme.title: The Thing
programme.desc: An alien that can duplicate other life forms invades a polar research station in this remake of the 1951 classic "The Thing from Another World."","large":"In remote Antarctica, a group of American research scientists are disturbed at their base camp by a helicopter shooting at a sled dog. When they take in the dog, it brutally attacks both human beings and canines in the camp, and they discover that the beast can assume the shape of its victims. A resourceful helicopter pilot and the camp doctor lead the camp crew in a desperate, gory battle against the vicious creature before it picks them all off, one by one.

programme.title: Tremors
programme.desc: Four big worms with multiple tongues dig high-speed around people (Kevin Bacon, Fred Ward, Finn Carter) in the middle of nowhere.","large":"Repairmen Val McKee (Kevin Bacon) and Earl Bassett (Fred Ward) are tired of their dull lives in the small desert town of Perfection, Nev. But just as the two try to skip town, they happen upon a series of mysterious deaths and a concerned seismologist (Finn Carter) studying unnatural readings below the ground. With the help of an eccentric couple (Reba McEntire, Michael Gross), the group fights for survival against giant, worm-like monsters hungry for human flesh.

programme.title: Tremors II: Aftershocks
programme.desc: The Mexican government hires two handymen (Fred Ward, Michael Gross) to battle huge man-eating worms plaguing an oil field.","large":"After spending all the reward money from his first encounter with the giant man-eating worms called Graboids, Earl Bassett (Fred Ward) agrees to hunt more of the deadly creatures at a Mexican oil refinery for $50,000 each. Knowing that he cannot face the monsters alone, Earl recruits Burt Gummer (Michael Gross), another veteran of the incident in Nevada, to supply the firepower. There is only one problem: The Graboids have now evolved to attack above ground.

programme.title: The Werewolf of London
programme.desc: An Asian werewolf (Warner Oland) bites a botanist (Henry Hull) in Tibet and rivals him for the antidote in London.","large":"While in Tibet researching a mysterious flower that purportedly takes its strength from the moon, botanist Wilfred Glendon is bitten by a strange creature. Back in London, Glendon becomes absorbed in his research of the plant, and is annoyed by the appearance of fellow scientist Dr. Yogami, who reveals that the plant is the only known temporary antidote for werewolves. Glendon remains skeptical until the next full moon, when he undergoes a startling transformation.

programme.title: The Wolf Man
programme.desc: Bitten by a werewolf, an aristocrat (Lon Chaney) grows fangs, fur and a muzzle, then begs his father (Claude Rains) for help.","large":"When his brother dies, Larry Talbot (Lon Chaney) returns to Wales and reconciles with his father (Claude Rains). While there, he visits an antique shop and, hoping to impress Gwen (Evelyn Ankers), the attractive shopkeeper, buys a silver walking cane. That same night he kills a wolf with it, only to later learn that he actually killed a man (Bela Lugosi). A gypsy (Maria Ouspenskaya) explains that it was her son, a werewolf, that he killed, and that Larry is now one himself.

programme.title: Altered
programme.desc: Fifteen years after they were abducted by aliens, four men get a chance to take revenge when they capture one of the creatures.","large":"Forever damaged by their stint as the scientific subjects of hostile alien creatures, a trio of alien-abduction survivors -- Otis (Michael C. Williams), Duke (Brad William Henke) and Cody (Paul McCarthy-Boyington) -- troll the wooded site of their disappearance, heavily armed, in search of their attackers. After wounding a violent alien in the woods, the three drag its dying body to the home of reclusive fellow abductee Wyatt (Adam Kaufman), barricade themselves in and prepare for the worst.

programme.title: The Purge: Anarchy
programme.desc: Three groups of people intertwine and are left stranded in the streets on Purge Night, trying to survive the chaos and violence that occurs.","large":"One night per year, the government sanctions a 12-hour period in which citizens can commit any crime they wish -- including murder -- without fear of punishment or imprisonment. Leo, a sergeant who lost his son, plans a vigilante mission of revenge during the mayhem. However, instead of a death-dealing avenger, he becomes the unexpected protector of four innocent strangers who desperately need his help if they are to survive the night.

programme.title: Ouija
programme.desc: Teens (Olivia Cooke, Daren Kagasoff, Douglas Smith) unwittingly awaken a dark power when they use an antique Ouija board to try to communicate with a friend who recently died.","large":"Following the sudden death of her best friend, Debbie, Laine finds an antique Ouija board in Debbie's room and tries to use it to say goodbye. Instead, she makes contact with a spirit that calls itself DZ. As strange events begin to occur, Laine enlists others to help her determine DZ's identity and what it wants. As the friends delve deeper, they find that Debbie's mysterious death was not unique, and that they will suffer the same fate unless they learn how to close the portal they've opened.

programme.title: Ouija: Origin of Evil
programme.desc: A séance scam leads to terror when an evil spirit possesses a widow's the youngest daughter in 1967 Los Angeles.","large":"In 1967 Los Angeles, widowed mother Alice Zander (Elizabeth Reaser) unwittingly invites authentic evil into her home by adding a new stunt to bolster her séance scam business. When the merciless spirit overtakes her youngest daughter Doris (Lulu Wilson), the small family must confront unthinkable fears to save her and send her possessor back to the other side.

programme.title: The Purge
programme.desc: A wealthy family is held hostage for harboring the target of a murderous syndicate during the Purge, a 12-hour period in which any and all crime is legal.","large":"In an America ravaged by crime and overcrowded prisons, the government sanctions an annual 12-hour period during which all criminal activity -- including murder -- is legal. James Sandin and his family face the ultimate test when an intruder drags the vicious outside world into their home. James, Mary and their two children struggle to survive the night while trying not to turn into monsters like the ones they are striving to avoid.

programme.title: The Purge: Election Year
programme.desc: Former Police Sergeant Barnes becomes head of security for Senator Charlie Roan, a Presidential candidate targeted for death on Purge night due to her vow to eliminate the Purge.","large":"As a young woman, Sen. Charlie Roan survived the annual night of lawlessness that took the lives of her family members. As a presidential candidate, Roan is determined to end the yearly tradition of bloodlust once and for all. When her opponents hatch a deadly scheme, the senator finds herself trapped on the streets of Washington, D.C., just as the latest Purge gets underway. Now, it's up to Leo Barnes, her head of security, to keep her alive during the next 12 hours of mayhem.

programme.title: Tremors
programme.desc: Four big worms with multiple tongues dig high-speed around people (Kevin Bacon, Fred Ward, Finn Carter) in the middle of nowhere.","large":"Repairmen Val McKee (Kevin Bacon) and Earl Bassett (Fred Ward) are tired of their dull lives in the small desert town of Perfection, Nev. But just as the two try to skip town, they happen upon a series of mysterious deaths and a concerned seismologist (Finn Carter) studying unnatural readings below the ground. With the help of an eccentric couple (Reba McEntire, Michael Gross), the group fights for survival against giant, worm-like monsters hungry for human flesh.

programme.title: Tremors II: Aftershocks
programme.desc: The Mexican government hires two handymen (Fred Ward, Michael Gross) to battle huge man-eating worms plaguing an oil field.","large":"After spending all the reward money from his first encounter with the giant man-eating worms called Graboids, Earl Bassett (Fred Ward) agrees to hunt more of the deadly creatures at a Mexican oil refinery for $50,000 each. Knowing that he cannot face the monsters alone, Earl recruits Burt Gummer (Michael Gross), another veteran of the incident in Nevada, to supply the firepower. There is only one problem: The Graboids have now evolved to attack above ground.

programme.title: Tremors 3: Back to Perfection
programme.desc: Mutated graboids return to feast on the residents of Perfection, threatening its new status as a tourist attraction.","large":"Legendary monster-killer Burt Gummer (Michael Gross) has returned to Perfection, Nev., scene of the original attacks by the worm creatures with razor teeth known as graboids. Sure enough, the creatures attack again, only now they're split into graboids, shriekers and a new mutation known as ass-blasters, which are propelled into flight by combustible flatulence. It's up to Burt, Jack Sawyer (Matthew Seth Wilson) and other locals to save their town from destruction.

programme.title: Tremors 4: The Legend Begins
programme.desc: A man (Michael Gross) hires a mercenary to destroy gigantic worms that are terrorizing a mining town in the 1800s.","large":"Prim East Coast dandy Hiram Gummer (Michael Gross) arrives in the town of Rejection, Nev., to investigate a series of strange deaths at the silver mine he owns. He receives help from local innkeeper Christine Lord (Sara Botsford) and miner Juan Padilla (Brent Roam). But, when it turns out that gigantic killer worms that burrow underground are responsible for the miners' deaths, Hiram decides he'd better call in expert gunslinger Black Hand Kelly (Billy Drago) to save the day.

programme.title: Tremors 5: Bloodlines
programme.desc: Survivalist Burt Gummer (Michael Gross) and his new sidekick Travis (Jamie Kennedy) are hired to track down an ass-blaster terrorizing South Africa. As they engage in battles with the aggressive creatures, they discover an even more lethal creature.

programme.title: Tremors: A Cold Day in Hell
programme.desc: Burt Gummer suspects that giant worms are being utilized as weapons at a research facility in Canada. He soon finds himself in a race against time to create an antidote from one of the creature's venom to save his own life.

programme.title: Tremors: Shrieker Island
programme.desc: Burt Gummer must save the day when a wealthy playboy unleashes a gigantic, carnivorous worm and other monsters on a tropical island.

programme.title: Tremors
programme.desc: Four big worms with multiple tongues dig high-speed around people (Kevin Bacon, Fred Ward, Finn Carter) in the middle of nowhere.","large":"Repairmen Val McKee (Kevin Bacon) and Earl Bassett (Fred Ward) are tired of their dull lives in the small desert town of Perfection, Nev. But just as the two try to skip town, they happen upon a series of mysterious deaths and a concerned seismologist (Finn Carter) studying unnatural readings below the ground. With the help of an eccentric couple (Reba McEntire, Michael Gross), the group fights for survival against giant, worm-like monsters hungry for human flesh.

Sure enough, the creatures attack again, only now they're split into graboids, shriekers and a new mutation known as ass-blasters, which are propelled into flight by combustible flatulence. It's up to Burt, Jack Sawyer (Matthew Seth Wilson) and other locals to save their town from destruction.

programme.desc: A man (Michael Gross) hires a mercenary to destroy gigantic worms that are terrorizing a mining town in the 1800s.","large":"Prim East Coast dandy Hiram Gummer (Michael Gross) arrives in the town of Rejection, Nev., to investigate a series of strange deaths at the silver mine he owns. He receives help from local innkeeper Christine Lord (Sara Botsford) and miner Juan Padilla (Brent Roam). But, when it turns out that gigantic killer worms that burrow underground are responsible for the miners' deaths, Hiram decides he'd better call in expert gunslinger Black Hand Kelly (Billy Drago) to save the day.

programme.title: Tremors 5: Bloodlines
programme.desc: Survivalist Burt Gummer (Michael Gross) and his new sidekick Travis (Jamie Kennedy) are hired to track down an ass-blaster terrorizing South Africa. As they engage in battles with the aggressive creatures, they discover an even more lethal creature.

programme.title: Love Actually
programme.desc: Nine intertwined journeys examine the complexities of the one emotion that connects all individuals, love.","large":"Nine intertwined journeys examine the complexities of the one emotion that connects all individuals, love. Among these individuals is David, the handsome, newly elected British prime minister who falls for a junior staffer. Sarah is a graphic designer whose devotion to her mentally ill brother complicates her love life. Harry, a married man, is tempted by his attractive new secretary.

programme.title: The Wedding Date
programme.desc: A desperate woman (Debra Messing) pays a male escort (Dermot Mulroney) $6,000 to accompany her to London for her sister's wedding.","large":"With the wedding of her younger sister (Amy Adams) fast approaching, Kat Ellis (Debra Messing) faces the undesirable prospect of traveling alone to London for the ceremony. While this is bad enough, Jeffrey (Jeremy Sheffield), the man who left her as they moved closer to marriage, happens to be the groom's best man. Determined to show everyone -- most of all Jeffrey -- that her romantic life is as full and thrilling as ever, Kat hires a charming male escort (Dermot Mulroney) as her date.

programme.title: Wimbledon
programme.desc: An English tennis player (Paul Bettany) reinvigorates his game after finding romance with an American counterpart (Kirsten Dunst).","large":"Frustrated at his own failures and disillusioned with professional sports, tennis player Peter Colt (Paul Bettany) resolves to retire from competition and become an instructor at an exclusive private club. But when Colt receives a surprise wild-card berth in Wimbledon, he can't help but enter the tournament. Soon, Colt meets Lizzie Bradbury (Kirsten Dunst), a beautiful American tennis player with an upcoming match of her own, and finds the inspiration he hopes will turn his luck around.

programme.title: Miss Pettigrew Lives for a Day
programme.desc: A middle-aged British governess (Frances McDormand) gets a taste of the glamorous life when she takes a job as the caretaker of an American celebrity (Amy Adams).","large":"It's 1939 and governess Guinevere Pettigrew finds herself out of work and on the bread line. Middle-aged and running out of options, Miss Pettigrew takes an uncharacteristic gamble when, after being refused work at an employment agency, she steals the details of a juicy assignment and pursues the job herself.

programme.title: Mamma Mia!Here We Go Again
programme.desc: In 1979 Donna falls in love with Sam while embarking on a series of adventures throughout Europe. In the present day, Donna's pregnant daughter reunites with her mother's old friends and boyfriends on the Greek island of Kalokairi.","large":"In 1979 young Donna, Tanya and Rosie graduate from Oxford University -- leaving Donna free to embark on a series of adventures throughout Europe. On her journeys, she makes the acquaintances of Harry, Bill and Sam -- the latter whom she falls in love with, but he's also the man who breaks her heart. In the present day, Donna's pregnant daughter, Sophie, dreams of renovating a taverna while reuniting with her mother's old friends and boyfriends on the Greek island of Kalokairi.

programme.title: Love Actually
programme.desc: Nine intertwined journeys examine the complexities of the one emotion that connects all individuals, love.","large":"Nine intertwined journeys examine the complexities of the one emotion that connects all individuals, love. Among these individuals is David, the handsome, newly elected British prime minister who falls for a junior staffer. Sarah is a graphic designer whose devotion to her mentally ill brother complicates her love life. Harry, a married man, is tempted by his attractive new secretary.

programme.desc: A desperate woman (Debra Messing) pays a male escort (Dermot Mulroney) $6,000 to accompany her to London for her sister's wedding.","large":"With the wedding of her younger sister (Amy Adams) fast approaching, Kat Ellis (Debra Messing) faces the undesirable prospect of traveling alone to London for the ceremony. Determined to show everyone -- most of all Jeffrey -- that her romantic life is as full and thrilling as ever, Kat hires a charming male escort (Dermot Mulroney) as her date.

On her journeys, she makes the acquaintances of Harry, Bill and Sam -- the latter whom she falls in love with, but he's also the man who breaks her heart. Among these individuals is David, the handsome, newly elected British prime minister who falls for a junior staffer. Sarah is a graphic designer whose devotion to her mentally ill brother complicates her love life. Harry, a married man, is tempted by his attractive new secretary.

programme.title: The Wedding Date
programme.desc: A desperate woman (Debra Messing) pays a male escort (Dermot Mulroney) $6,000 to accompany her to London for her sister's wedding.","large":"With the wedding of her younger sister (Amy Adams) fast approaching, Kat Ellis (Debra Messing) faces the undesirable prospect of traveling alone to London for the ceremony. While this is bad enough, Jeffrey (Jeremy Sheffield), the man who left her as they moved closer to marriage, happens to be the groom's best man. Determined to show everyone -- most of all Jeffrey -- that her romantic life is as full and thrilling as ever, Kat hires a charming male escort (Dermot Mulroney) as her date.

programme.title: Parenthood
programme.desc: A middle-class man (Steve Martin), his wife (Mary Steenburgen), his father and a divorcee (Dianne Wiest) try to be good parents.","large":"Perfectionist Gil Buckman (Steve Martin) struggles with the deficiencies of his children, thinking they reflect poorly on his parenting -- and Gil's siblings only add to the stress of his life. One of his sisters (Dianne Wiest) faces difficulty when her teenage daughter (Martha Plimpton) becomes pregnant. Another (Harley Jane Kozak) clashes with her husband (Rick Moranis) when she asks for more children. Gil's immature brother (Tom Hulce) turns up as well, with a young son he can barely handle.

programme.title: Bowfinger
programme.desc: A broke producer (Steve Martin) hires a nerd (Eddie Murphy) who looks like a famous actor and other misfits to star in his latest movie.","large":"On the verge of bankruptcy and desperate for his big break, aspiring filmmaker Bobby Bowfinger (Steve Martin) concocts a crazy plan to make his ultimate dream movie. Rallying a ragtag team that includes a starry-eyed ingénue (Heather Graham), a has-been diva (Christine Baranski) and a film studio gofer (Jamie Kennedy), he sets out to shoot a blockbuster featuring the biggest star in Hollywood, Kit Ramsey (Eddie Murphy) -- only without letting Ramsey know he's in the picture.

programme.title: Johnny English
programme.desc: A bumbling British agent (Rowan Atkinson) tries to find a French billionaire (John Malkovich) who has stolen the crown jewels.","large":"Pascal Sauvage (John Malkovich), a villain intent on stealing Britain's Crown Jewels, has murdered the country's top undercover agents, and mediocre spy Johnny English (Rowan Atkinson) is ordered to prevent further mayhem. But even with help from quick-thinking sidekick Bough (Ben Miller), the goofy agent lands himself in one precarious situation after another. Only when he meets up with Interpol crime-fighter Lorna Campbell (Natalie Imbruglia) is Johnny able to chip away at Pascal's defenses.

programme.title: Johnny English Reborn
programme.desc: The bumbling secret agent (Rowan Atkinson) uses his questionable combat skills and high-tech gadgets to protect a Chinese leader from a band of assassins.","large":"After a disastrous mission in Mozambique, British agent Johnny English (Rowan Atkinson) has retreated to a Tibetan monastery to try to forget his shame. But when he receives an urgent call from MI-7 to lead a mission that only he can handle, English is back in action. Using his questionable combat skills and an assortment of high-tech gadgets, English, along with his new partner, Agent Tucker (Daniel Kaluuya), must foil a plot to kill the Chinese premier.

programme.title: Bean
programme.desc: An eccentric, accident-prone British art caretaker (Rowan Atkinson) wreaks havoc at the U.S. unveiling of "Whistler's Mother."","large":"At the Royal National Gallery in London, the bumbling Mr. Bean (Rowan Atkinson) is a guard with good intentions who always seems to destroy anything he touches. Unless, of course, he's sleeping on the job. With the chairman (John Mills) blocking Bean's firing, the board decides to send him to a Los Angeles art gallery under false credentials. When Bean arrives, his chaos-causing ways are as sharp as ever, and curator David Langley (Peter MacNicol) has the unenviable task of keeping Bean in line.

programme.title: Parenthood
programme.desc: A middle-class man (Steve Martin), his wife (Mary Steenburgen), his father and a divorcee (Dianne Wiest) try to be good parents.","large":"Perfectionist Gil Buckman (Steve Martin) struggles with the deficiencies of his children, thinking they reflect poorly on his parenting -- and Gil's siblings only add to the stress of his life. One of his sisters (Dianne Wiest) faces difficulty when her teenage daughter (Martha Plimpton) becomes pregnant. Another (Harley Jane Kozak) clashes with her husband (Rick Moranis) when she asks for more children. Gil's immature brother (Tom Hulce) turns up as well, with a young son he can barely handle.

programme.title: Bowfinger
programme.desc: A broke producer (Steve Martin) hires a nerd (Eddie Murphy) who looks like a famous actor and other misfits to star in his latest movie.","large":"On the verge of bankruptcy and desperate for his big break, aspiring filmmaker Bobby Bowfinger (Steve Martin) concocts a crazy plan to make his ultimate dream movie. Rallying a ragtag team that includes a starry-eyed ingénue (Heather Graham), a has-been diva (Christine Baranski) and a film studio gofer (Jamie Kennedy), he sets out to shoot a blockbuster featuring the biggest star in Hollywood, Kit Ramsey (Eddie Murphy) -- only without letting Ramsey know he's in the picture.

programme.title: Johnny English
programme.desc: A bumbling British agent (Rowan Atkinson) tries to find a French billionaire (John Malkovich) who has stolen the crown jewels.","large":"Pascal Sauvage (John Malkovich), a villain intent on stealing Britain's Crown Jewels, has murdered the country's top undercover agents, and mediocre spy Johnny English (Rowan Atkinson) is ordered to prevent further mayhem. But even with help from quick-thinking sidekick Bough (Ben Miller), the goofy agent lands himself in one precarious situation after another. Only when he meets up with Interpol crime-fighter Lorna Campbell (Natalie Imbruglia) is Johnny able to chip away at Pascal's defenses.

programme.desc: Two brothers split because of differing beliefs, yet fate brings them back together as they eventually rescue and support each other through unfolding events.

programme.title: Gunda Gardi
programme.desc: Kalicharan, a ruthless gang leader, terrorises the city. To stop his reign, Police Commissioner Karan Singh is assigned the mission to bring him down.

programme.title: Movie
programme.desc: The movie name is yet to be announced by the channel.

programme.title: Movie
programme.desc: The movie name is yet to be announced by the channel.

programme.title: Movie
programme.desc: The movie name is yet to be announced by the channel.

programme.title: Khatta Meetha
programme.desc: Starring: Akshay Kumar,Johny Lever. A small-time contractor faces relentless corruption, political pressure, & personal humiliation while trying to complete honest road projects. His fight exposes the absurdities of a system

programme.title: Wanted
programme.desc: Starring: Jeet,Biswajit Chakraborty. Raja is hired to shoot a party leader but is instructed not to kill him. When the politician ends up getting killed by an unknown assassin, Raja becomes the prime suspect.

programme.title: Valatty
programme.desc: Starring: Mahima Nambiar,Roshan Mathew. A heartwarming love story of two dogs, Tomy and Amalu, whose owners are in disapproval because of their religious differences.

programme.title: Extra Ordinary Man
programme.desc: Starring: Nithiin,Sreeleela. Abhinay, once lost in artistic struggle, discovers love that redefines his path. A sudden opportunity to act in a movie changes everything, pushing him toward fame and self-discovery.

programme.title: Holiday: A Soldier Is Never Off Duty
programme.desc: Starring: Akshay Kumar,Sonakshi Sinha. Virat uncovers a terrorist plan to bomb Mumbai. He leads his team into action, risking everything to prevent catastrophe and defend the city.

programme.title: Kanguva
programme.desc: Starring: Suriya,Bobby Deol. Bounty hunter Francis learns he's the reincarnation of warrior Kanguva. As memories awaken, he must face revenge, redemption, and protect someone precious from his old enemies.

programme.title: Tholi Prema
programme.desc: Starring: Varun Tej,Raashi Khanna. Aditya looks for a missing girl but also reflects on his failed love story with Varsha, realizing their differences due to his impulsive nature.

programme.title: Operation Java
programme.desc: Starring: Balu Varghese,Lukman Avaran. A team of police officers from the Kochi cyber cell embarks on a mission to investigate a series of mysterious crimes and unlawful activities.

programme.title: Return Of Raju
programme.desc: Starring: Akkineni Nagarjuna,Ramya Krishnan. A mother decides to seek the help of her husband's spirit when she sees her son's marital life shattering in front of her.

programme.title: Bangarraju
programme.desc: Starring: Nagarjuna,Ramya Krishna. Chinna Bangarraju continues his grandpa's legacy as a flirt. Grandma worries about his loneliness and sets out to find him a companion before she leaves.

programme.title: K3 - Kaali Ka Karishma
programme.desc: Starring: Raghava Lawrence,Oviya. Raghava, a young man fearful of ghosts, enjoys a happy life with his family until a trip to Coimbatore results in his possession by a vengeful spirit.

programme.title: Krrish 3
programme.desc: Starring: Hrithik Roshan,Priyanka Chopra. Krrish and his scientist father have to save the world and their own family from an evil man named Kaal and his team of human-animal mutants led by the ruthleSS Kaya. Will they succeed? How?

programme.title: Uri: The Surgical Strike
programme.desc: Starring: Vicky Kaushal,Paresh Rawal. After militants attack a base in Uri, Major Vihaan Singh Shergill executes a covert strike across the border to eliminate the perpetrators with tactical precision.

programme.title: Raid 2
programme.desc: Starring: Ajay Devgn,Riteish Deshmukh. In Bhoj, Amay Patnaik uncovers a corrupt empire led by Dada Bhai. His pursuit of justice challenges the grip of power and the silence it demands.

programme.title: Kotigobba 3
programme.desc: Starring: Sudeepa Aftab,Shivdasani. After framing ACP Kishore, Satya becomes an international criminal targeted by Interpol while Kishore seeks revenge upon his release from prison.

programme.title: Bachchhan Paandey
programme.desc: Starring: Akshay Kumar,Kriti Sanon. To succeed, Myra focuses her film on notorious gangster Bachchhan Paandey. The plot thickens when Paandey demands to act in the film, creating chaos and raising stakes for everyone involved.

programme.title: Ghost
programme.desc: Starring: Shiva Rajkumar,Jayaram. A gangster hijacks a city prison with his team, demanding justice. He threatens to unleash criminals, pushing the city to its limits in this gripping action thriller.

programme.title: Vijay The Master
programme.desc: Starring: Joseph Vijay,Vijay Sethupathi. An alcoholic professor, unknowingly assigned to a juvenile facility, confronts a ruthless gangster exploiting children as scapegoats for his crimes, sparking a battle for justice.

programme.title: Jaanwar
programme.desc: Starring: Akshay Kumar,Karisma Kapoor. A reformed criminal, Babu finds purpose in raising a train crash survivor as his own. But when his past resurfaces, his newfound happiness hangs in the balance.

programme.title: Vivah
programme.desc: Starring: Shahid Kapoor,Amrita Rao. Poonam, a traditional girl gets engaged to Prem. Their faith and love are tested when an accident occurs and Poonam might be scarred for life.

programme.title: Valimai
programme.desc: Starring: Ajith Kumar,Karthikeya. A notorious biker gang pushes the city into lawlessness. Arjun, a brave cop, takes charge, determined to dismantle the gang and restore peace before everything collapses.

programme.title: Butterfly
programme.desc: Starring: Anupama Parameswaran. Geetha battles to rescue her sister's kidnapped children. In her desperate mission, she unearths disturbing truths about her seemingly ordinary neighbours.

programme.title: Pralay The Destroyer
programme.desc: Starring: Sai Srinivas Bellamkonda,Pooja Hegde. A baby survives a brutal massacre. Years later, destiny leads him back to the gang that destroyed his family, setting the stage for revenge, justice, and an epic showdown.

programme.title: Sam Bahadur
programme.desc: Starring: Vicky Kaushal,Fatima Sana Shaikh. Sam Manekshaw fought five wars, served four decades, and still had time for iconic one-liners. A hero in boots, he became India's first Field Marshal-with style!

programme.title: Bharat
programme.desc: Starring: Salman Khan,Katrina Kaif. Amidst the chaos of the India-Pakistan partition, Bharat is tasked with safeguarding his family. He honors his father's wish, becoming their steadfast guardian through a turbulent era.

programme.title: Pataas
programme.desc: Starring: Nandamuri Kalyan Ram,Ashutosh Rana. Kalyan Sinha works with corrupt politician GK until his best friend is killed. The tragedy forces him to confront his choices and fight to reclaim his integrity.

programme.title: Kick
programme.desc: Starring: Ravi Teja,Ileana. Naina leaves wanderer Kalyan and agrees to wed a cop, only to discover he is after Kalyan, pulling her back into turmoil.

programme.title: Aman
programme.desc: Dr Gautamdas help those devastated by the atom bomb explosions in Hiroshima and Nagasaki, and falls in love with the beautiful Meloda.

programme.title: Shirdi Ke Sai Baba
programme.desc: A doctor has no faith in the powers of Sai Baba. However, his wife and he travel to Shirdi when their son falls sick. After hearing certain stories of Sai Baba, the doctor develops faith in him.

programme.title: Saathi (1968)
programme.desc: Suraj and Amar are small-time criminals. In search of wealth, Suraj kills a gangster and becomes a big time gang leader.

programme.title: Kudrat Ka Kanoon
programme.desc: Vijay tries to protect the people from a tyrannical local chief but is falsely accused of murder and imprisoned. His wife is also pursued by hooligans.

programme.title: Pitaah
programme.desc: After a tyrant's sons assault a farmer's child and corrupt officials erase proof, the grieving parents lose faith in justice, pushing the father toward vengeance.

programme.title: Anita
programme.desc: Neeraj's world shatters when his love, Anita, seemingly commits suicide after a botched elopement. As he uncovers her mysterious past, he's haunted by her ghost-truth or madness?

programme.title: Adat Se Majboor
programme.desc: In this dramatic tale, devout firefighter Dinanath mistakenly believes Salma is Hindu and plans a future for her with his son. Complications arise with hidden truths and dangerous enemies.

programme.title: My Life My Story
programme.desc: RJ Anmol chats with Bollywood stars who share real stories, emotional memories, and funny moments from their lives. A candid and heartwarming glimpse into stardom.

programme.title: Tumm Se Tumm Tak
programme.desc: Anu and Aryavardhan fall in love despite a big age gap. Facing family disapproval and challenges, they fight to show that real love knows no limits or rules.

programme.title: Lakshmi Nivas
programme.desc: A multi-generational drama showing daughters' struggles, family loyalty, and societal expectations in a rural setup.

programme.title: Saru
programme.desc: A kabaddi champion from Rajasthan moves to Mumbai to chase her dreams. Along the way, she reunites with her family and fights hard to earn her mother the respect she truly deserves.

programme.title: Tumm Se Tumm Tak
programme.desc: Anu and Aryavardhan fall in love despite a big age gap. Facing family disapproval and challenges, they fight to show that real love knows no limits or rules.

programme.desc: After an evening of recitation and song, Shreemoti and Rajiv discover four friends dead. Panicked, Shreemoti calls Swayambhu, who arrives and questions Rajiv, farmhouse owner, about the tragedy.
